cfg_statements.code: from collections import Counter, defaultdict, deque
from operator import add, itemgetter, mul, xor
for i in range(h): for j in range(w): if s[i][j] == "#": dist[i][j] = 0 black_cnt += 1
for j in range(w): if s[i][j] == "#": dist[i][j] = 0 black_cnt += 1

while d: v = d.popleft() x = v[0] y = v[1] for i in range(4): nx = x+ dx[i] ny = y+ dy[i] if nx < 0 or nx >= h or ny < 0 or ny >= w: continue if dist[nx][ny] == -1: dist[nx][ny] = dist[x][y] + 1 d.append([nx,ny])
for i in range(4): nx = x+ dx[i] ny = y+ dy[i] if nx < 0 or nx >= h or ny < 0 or ny >= w: continue if dist[nx][ny] == -1: dist[nx][ny] = dist[x][y] + 1 d.append([nx,ny])
if nx < 0 or nx >= h or ny < 0 or ny >= w: continue
if dist[-1][-1] == -1: print(-1) else: shortest = dist[-1][-1] print(h*w - black_cnt -(shortest+1))
for i in range(r): bunbo = bunbo*(i+1)%mod bunshi = bunshi*(n-i)%mod
